---
title: "persistence.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\games\odin_protocol\engine\persistence.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.57
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.27
---

## Intent
The `persistence.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on OdinPersistence, __init__, save_state, load_state, _git_commit. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via OdinPersistence, __init__, save_state, load_state, _git_commit. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `OdinPersistence`
- `__init__`
- `save_state`
- `load_state`
- `_git_commit`
